result.stderr:
ConfigBlock.Tool 1.0.0-preview3
Copyright (C) 2026 ConfigBlock.Tool

  -i, --input                 Required. Input vars file.

  -a, --all                   If set, all possible permutations of scope
                              parameters are build in nested folders.

  -v, --variable              Sets scope variable. Format: SET.VAR=VALUE

  -o, --output-path           (Default: .config-build) Output base path. Can be
                              relative to the input vars file.

  -w, --watch                 Watch and recompile if any source file has
                              changed.

  -e, --export-config-file    If set, summary config file is generated.

  -n, --no-output             If set, output files produced by configuration are
                              not written to the disk.

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

ConfigBlock.Tool 1.0.0-preview3
Copyright (C) 2026 ConfigBlock.Tool

  -i, --input                 Required. Input vars file.

  -a, --all                   If set, all possible permutations of scope
                              parameters are build in nested folders.

  -v, --variable              Sets scope variable. Format: SET.VAR=VALUE

  -e, --export-config-file    If set, summary config file is generated.

options.description: If set, all possible permutations of scope parameters are build in nested folders.
If set, summary config file is generated.
If set, output files produced by configuration are not written to the disk.
Output base path. Can be relative to the input vars file.
Watch and recompile if any source file has changed.
